g.title: Arguments 1-6 are passed in registers (RDI, RSI, RDX, RCX, R8, R9)

g.text: rbp - 48 to -X | Local Variables / Buffers | Var
rbp - X to -Y | Compiler Spill Slots | Var
rsp - 8 to -128 | ABI Red Zone (Leaf function scratch) | 128B

ul.li: Stack Alignment: The stack must be 16-byte aligned at the point of a call instruction.
The Red Zone: 128 bytes below rsp are reserved. Functions can use this without adjusting rsp, provided they don't call other functions.
Parity: The call instruction pushes an 8-byte return address. A standard function prologue (push rbp; mov rbp, rsp) restores 16-byte alignment.

Argument Passing:
%rdi, %rsi, %rdx, %rcx, %r8, %r9
Remaining arguments on stack in reverse order.

g.title: Arguments 1-6 are passed in registers (RDI, RSI, RDX, RCX, R8, R9)
